allow: Bash(node -e "const df = require\(''digest-fetch''\); console.log\(''Successfully loaded digest-fetch''\);")

Bash(node -e "const DigestFetch = require\(''digest-fetch''\); const df = new DigestFetch\(''user'', ''pass''\); console.log\(''DigestFetch loaded successfully. Has fetch method:'', typeof df.fetch === ''function''\);")
Bash(node -e "const fetch = require\(''node-fetch''\); console.log\(''node-fetch available, version:'', fetch.default ? ''v3+'' : ''v2''\);")
Bash(node -e "try { const fetch = require\(''node-fetch''\); console.log\(''Successfully resolved node-fetch''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Error:'', e.message\); }")
